content:
# Dynamic Foam Analyzer

**Summary**: A device used to measure the stability and behavior of foams by monitoring volume decay over time.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-drwish|AL-DRWISH, 2024]] used a Dynamic Foam Analyzer (DFA 100) to determine foam stability and structure under various conditions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The DFA was used to observe that N2-foam is more stable than CO2-foam due to the higher permeability of CO2 through the film. ([[2024-al-drwish|AL-DRWISH, 2024, p. 54]])
